name: Long-Grain and Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Pour off half of the melted butter and reserve it.
3. To the remaining butter, add both long-grain rice and wild rice, as well as chopped onions.
4. Shake the pan to coat all grains with butter.
5. Add chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
6. Cook for 20-25 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
7. Stir in the reserved melted butter before serving.
